title: athyriopsis oldhamii
intro: Athyriopsis oldhamii, also known as the Chinese cinnamon fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Athyriopsis oldhamii include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and helping to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Athyriopsis oldhamii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and prevent various health issues.
